title: Mariosousa dolichostachya

The plant has been used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, inflammation, and respiratory issues, due to its potential health benefits in reducing oxidative stress and improving immune function. The bioactive constituents of Mariosousa dolichostachya include flavonoids, alkaloids, and phenolic compounds, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. In traditional herbal medicine, Mariosousa dolichostachya is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, which is commonly used to treat fever, cough, and respiratory infections.
taxonomy: Mariosousa dolichostachya is classified in the kingdom Plantae. It belongs to the family Fabaceae, which is a large and diverse group of flowering plants.
